_comment: pi-subagents scaling caps. Install to ~/.pi/agent/extensions/subagent/config.json on the box running Pi, then /reload. Defaults are far too small for a real fleet (concurrency 4, maxTasks 8, globalConcurrencyLimit 20).

_notes.parallel.concurrency: workers run simultaneously; set ~= live S3 node count (2x 4U12G chassis = 24). Excess just queues at the single-slot nodes.
_notes.parallel.maxTasks: max tasks per one subagent(tasks:[...]) batch; raise for dozens of workers.
_notes.globalConcurrencyLimit: global simultaneous cap across a run; keep >= concurrency.
_notes.orchestrator_load: the box running Pi executes N nested agent loops (mostly I/O-bound waiting on the gateway); very large N loads that box, not the fleet.
_notes.intercomBridge: add {"intercomBridge": {"enabled": false}} to hard-stop workers detaching to 'coordinate' if the persona fan-out clause isn't enough.
